news.title: The billionaires made a promise — now some want out
news.summary: In 2010, Warren Buffett and Bill Gates launched a disarmingly simple campaign they called the Giving Pledge: a public commitment, open to the world’s wealthiest people, to give away more than half their fortune during their lifetime or upon their death. news.title: Netflix’s ‘Frankenstein’ wins three Oscars, ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ wins two
news.summary: “Frankenstein” won for Best Production Design, Best Costume Design, and Best Makeup and Hairstyling, while “KPop Demon Hunters” won for Best Animated Feature and Best Original Song.

news.title: Google, Accel India accelerator chooses 5 startups and none are ‘AI wrappers’

news.title: Lawyer behind AI psychosis cases warns of mass casualty risks
news.summary: AI chatbots have been linked to suicides for years. Now one lawyer says they are showing up in mass casualty cases too, and the technology is moving faster than the safeguards.

news.title: Aether OS is a computer in a browser built for the AT Protocol
news.summary: Aether OS puts a full-fledged desktop in your browser that ties directly into the AT Protocol. That means it connects to your Bluesky account and other public records.
